tenets.title: Made slowly.
tenets.body: Each drop is a single run, made in a small atelier in Porto. There is no restock — only the next.

tenets.title: Designed to last.
tenets.body: Cuts soften, colors deepen. Garments are intended to grow into the body.

tenets.title: Quietly worn.
tenets.body: No screen prints, no logos at the chest. The label sits on the inside seam.

newsletter.heading: A letter, once a month.
newsletter.body: A note from the studio, the cover image of the next drop, and a link before anyone else has it.

about.heading: We make a small number of things, with care.
about.intro: Agora began as a notebook — drawings of garments we wanted to live in but couldn't find. Softer than uniform, quieter than fashion. We started with a single tee, made fifty of them, and listened. Each drop since has followed the same rule: small, considered, finished by hand, and never restocked.
about.practiceBody: We work the way a studio works — slowly, with notes. A drop begins as a feeling and ends as a paper-wrapped box on a doorstep.
about.spaceBody: The atelier is in a converted printer's shop in Porto. The cutting tables are old; the light comes from the north. We share it with two other small labels and a bookbinder. There is no showroom and there are no sales. Everything we make is on the site, and when it sells out, that is the end of it.

footer.tagline: A clothing studio working in volumes. Made in Porto, Portugal, in small numbers, by hand.

drops.title: Structure
drops.subtitle: On weight, line, and the shape of standing.
drops.story: Structure is a study in mass — the way a column holds light, the way a heavy garment holds the body. Six pieces, cut for posture.

drops.title: Foundation
drops.subtitle: The first stones — the garments everything else is built upon.
drops.story: Foundation begins the practice. Six pieces, cut from heavy cottons and undyed wool, finished by hand in a small atelier in Porto. The palette is limestone and shadow. The silhouettes are quiet enough to live in.

products.name: Core Hoodie
products.description: Boxy, garment-dyed in small batches. The hood drapes; the cuffs are bound by hand.

products.name: Weight Tee
products.description: A boxy tee with weight enough to fall properly. Hand-rolled hem, taped shoulders.

products.name: Half Zip
products.description: A modest collar, a metal pull. Cut to sit cleanly under outerwear.

products.name: Cotton Sweats
products.description: A relaxed cut, gently tapered. Drawcord with metal tip. Made to be lived in.

products.name: Zip Hoodie
products.description: A full-zip with a soft, structured hood. Brass hardware, bound seams.

products.name: Oversized Tee
products.description: Cut wide through the chest, dropped at the shoulder. The hem is left raw.

drops.title: Origins
drops.subtitle: The garments that taught us what to make.
drops.story: The earliest patterns. Garments cut for the studio's own use, then offered to a small circle.

products.name: Origin Tee
products.description: The first tee. A blueprint for everything since.

drops.title: Intro
drops.subtitle: A first letter — the studio's opening note.
drops.story: A short, quiet release. Two pieces, sent to friends.

products.name: Intro Tee
products.description: The piece that started the practice.
